<!-- This file is generated by uv run python -m tools.generate_query_specs. Do not edit manually. -->

# approve_api_access_request query

## 001_select_api_access_requests.sql

### SQLの概要

承認対象の利用申請と現在状態を確認するため、利用申請を取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `api_access_requests`
- `projects`
- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_cognito_scopes`
- `api_access_reviews`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `access_request_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `access_request_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `requested_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `requested_reason` | `str` | no |
| `requested_by` | `str` | no |
| `requested_at` | `datetime` | no |
| `project_code` | `str` | no |
| `owner_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `api_code` | `str` | no |
| `api_name` | `str` | no |
| `apigw_rest_api_id` | `str` | no |
| `apigw_stage_name` | `str` | no |
| `api_scope_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `scope_full_name` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON p.project_id = ar.project_id`
- `JOIN ON a.api_id = ar.api_id`
- `JOIN ON s.api_stage_id = ar.api_stage_id`
- `JOIN ON api_scope.api_id = ar.api_id`
- `WHERE ar.access_request_id = @access_request_id AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM api_access_reviews AS rv WHERE rv.access_request_id = ar.access_request_id)`


## 002_select_api_reviewers.sql

### SQLの概要

承認者が対象APIのreviewerか確認するため、API reviewerを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `api_reviewers`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `is_hub_admin` | `Any` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `api_reviewer_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `reviewer_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `reviewer_role` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `WHERE api_id = @api_id AND (reviewer_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE)`


## 003_select_subscriptions.sql

### SQLの概要

重複承認を防ぐため、既存のactive subscriptionを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_api_subscriptions`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `subscription_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `approved_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `approved_by` | `str` | no |
| `approved_at` | `datetime` | no |

### 条件

- `WHERE project_id = @project_id AND api_stage_id = @api_stage_id`

## 006_select_project_cognito_clients.sql

### SQLの概要

承認後にscopeを付与する対象を決めるため、Project Cognito clientを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_clients`
- `project_usage_plans`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `approved_auth_mode` | `Any` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `client_type` | `str` | no |
| `cognito_user_pool_id` | `str` | no |
| `app_client_id` | `str` | no |
| `base_allowed_scopes` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |
| `allowed_oauth_flows` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |
| `project_usage_plan_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `apigw_usage_plan_id` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON up.project_id = c.project_id`
- `WHERE c.project_id = @project_id AND ((@approved_auth_mode = 'PUBLIC_PKCE' AND c.client_type = 'PUBLIC_PKCE') OR (@approved_auth_mode = 'CLIENT_CREDENTIALS' AND c.client_type = 'CONFIDENTIAL_CLIENT_CREDENTIALS') OR (@approved_auth_mode = 'BOTH'))`
